summary: A series of March 1945 SHAEF and Air Ministry memos discuss reported night phenomena, referred to as 'foo-fighters' and 'balls of fire, red,' observed by Bomber Command and tactical air crews; officials suggest some sightings may have been Me. 262 jets and flak rockets, but state no definite explanation could be given. A related memo notes that photographs of 'long cylindrical objects' claimed by a reconnaissance pilot could not be produced.
